tags_select_in_group.name: tags_select_in_group
tags_select_in_group.using:
exists (
				select 1 from "librarian".shared_tags st
				join "librarian".group_members gm on gm.group_id = st.group_id
				where st.tag_id = "librarian"."tags"."id"
				  and gm.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
			)

user_book_tags_select.name: user_book_tags_select
user_book_tags_select.using:
exists (
				select 1 from "librarian".tags t
				where t.id = "librarian"."user_book_tags"."tag_id"
				  and t.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
			)

user_book_tags_select_in_group.name: user_book_tags_select_in_group
user_book_tags_select_in_group.using:
exists (
				select 1 from "librarian".shared_tags st
				join "librarian".group_members gm on gm.group_id = st.group_id
				where st.tag_id = "librarian"."user_book_tags"."tag_id"
				  and gm.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
			)

user_book_tags_insert.name: user_book_tags_insert
user_book_tags_insert.withCheck:
exists (
				select 1 from "librarian".tags t
				where t.id = "librarian"."user_book_tags"."tag_id"
				  and t.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
			)

user_book_tags_delete.name: user_book_tags_delete
user_book_tags_delete.using:
exists (
				select 1 from "librarian".tags t
				where t.id = "librarian"."user_book_tags"."tag_id"
				  and t.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
			)

user_books_select_in_group.name: user_books_select_in_group
user_books_select_in_group.using:
exists (
				select 1 from "librarian".user_book_tags ubt
				join "librarian".shared_tags st on st.tag_id = ubt.tag_id
				join "librarian".group_members gm on gm.group_id = st.group_id
				where ubt.user_book_id = "librarian"."user_books"."id"
				  and gm.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
			)

user_books_select_on_loan.name: user_books_select_on_loan
user_books_select_on_loan.using:
exists (
				select 1 from "librarian".loans l
				where l.user_book_id = "librarian"."user_books"."id"
				  and l.borrower_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
			)

user_books_book_or_title.name: user_books_book_or_title
user_books_book_or_title.value: "librarian"."user_books"."book_id" IS NOT NULL OR "librarian"."user_books"."title" IS NOT NULL
